issues.description: Effect is severely incomplete. Missing the core mechanic: looking at 5 cards from top of deck, revealing up to 1 blue Event, and ordering the rest at bottom. Current DSL only shows a generic SearchDeck with no filters, quantity limits, or ordering logic.
Filter is 'Any' but should restrict to blue Events only, with a quantity limit of up to 1 card.

Missing action(s) to handle the remaining 4 cards (or fewer if Event found). The effect must allow ordering those cards at the bottom of the deck, which requires additional logic not captured in current DSL.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 blue Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
